verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "git reset --soft HEAD~1"; A also answers early with "Use a soft reset" then command.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one recommendation: "--soft is what keeps them staged"; A adds a broader "Quick reference" table and extra notes.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it starts with the exact command and a one-sentence explanation.
